steps.title: Identify the central contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts critics' warnings—that writing in Gĩkũyũ would make his works inaccessible—with the actual outcome: Ngũgĩ achieved literary success with works translated into 30+ languages.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
C captures this contrast with its “Although...it didn't prevent” structure, showing that skepticism about the language choice didn't block Ngũgĩ's success.

The other three either misstate facts from the passage, focus only on supporting details without the broader contrast, or omit the skepticism element entirely.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
